nasb.text: So the Lord said to Moses, “Take Joshua the son of Nun, a man in whom is the Spirit, and lay your hand on him;

esv.text: So the Lord said to Moses, “Take Joshua the son of Nun, a man in whom is the Spirit, and lay your hand on him.

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要揀選嫩的兒子約書亞，他心裡有聖靈，你要按手在他頭上，

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“嫩的儿子约书亚心里有圣灵，你把他召来，按手在他身上，
